fieldUpdates.formula: IF( LEN( IF( ISBLANK(TEXT( leaseworks__Asset_Type__c )), NULL, TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) ) + "-" + IF( ISBLANK(TEXT( leaseworks__Asset_Variant__c )), NULL, TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Variant__c) ) ) > 70, LEFT( IF( ISBLANK(TEXT( leaseworks__Asset_Type__c )), NULL, TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) ) + "-" + IF( ISBLANK(TEXT( leaseworks__Asset_Variant__c )), NULL, TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Variant__c) ), 70 ) + "..." + "-", IF( ISBLANK(TEXT( leaseworks__Asset_Type__c )), NULL, TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) ) + "-" + IF( ISBLANK(TEXT( leaseworks__Asset_Variant__c )), NULL, TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Variant__c) ) + "-" ) + CASE(MONTH( Datevalue(CreatedDate) ),1, "JAN", 2, "FEB", 3, "MAR", 4, "APR", 5,"MAY", 6, "JUN", 7, "JUL", 8, "AUG", 9, "SEP", 10, "OCT", 11, "NOV",12, "DEC","NONE" ) + "'" + RIGHT(TEXT(YEAR( Datevalue(CreatedDate) )),2)
fieldUpdates.name: AssetReqDetNameUpdate

rules.description: WF to update Asset Request Details object name field
rules.formula: AND( !ISBLANK(IF( ISBLANK(TEXT( leaseworks__Asset_Type__c )), NULL, TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) + " - " ) ) , !ISBLANK( IF( ISBLANK(TEXT( leaseworks__Asset_Variant__c )), NULL, TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Variant__c) + " - " ) ) )
